FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course Id containing this block instance

FIELD.NAME: owner
FIELD.COMMENT: Owner or person responsible for this notice

FIELD.NAME: owneremail
FIELD.COMMENT: Owner or person responsible for this notice

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Provides a mechanism or order or prioritise notices

FIELD.NAME: notes
FIELD.COMMENT: Administrative notes and next steps/actions for this notice e.g., when to hide or remove it. These notes are not displayed.

FIELD.NAME: staffonly
FIELD.COMMENT: Determines if the notice should be only visible to staff

FIELD.NAME: exclusive
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-course exclusive flag: 0=normal, 1=important (red), 2=information (blue). At most one per course is non-zero.

FIELD.NAME: createdbyuserid
FIELD.COMMENT: User Id who created this notice.

FIELD.NAME: modifiedbyuserid
FIELD.COMMENT: User Id who last modified this notice.

FIELD.NAME: additionaleditorid
FIELD.COMMENT: User Id of an additional editor for this notice. Additional editors may edit the notice without needing the manageallnotices capability.

TABLE.NAME: block_notices_read
TABLE.COMMENT: Records the most recent time each user has seen each notice. A notice is unread for a user when timeread is missing or older than the notice's timemodified.

FIELD.NAME: timeread
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of the most recent read for this user/notice pair.
